## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off call to align on goals, strategy, and next steps for GrowthX's engagement with Understory Agency for growth and demand generation.](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on nurturing workshop attendees and growing community membership as initial priorities](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Leverage existing warm leads and event attendees before expanding to cold outreach](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Implement workflows for post-event follow-ups and community building campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Utilize multiple team members' LinkedIn accounts for outreach, staying within safe daily limits](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Unique Value Proposition

  - [Combines both workflow tools and agency services, unlike competitors who focus on one or the other](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Addresses challenges like AI traffic loss, team capacity crisis, content strategy confusion, and scale vs. quality](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Offers comprehensive solution for creating high-quality, frequently updated content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### Current Marketing and Lead Generation Approach

  - [Relies heavily on events (workshops, dinners, mixers) to generate interest](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Minimal proactive outreach, mostly reactive to introductions and referrals](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Community building is a key focus, with plans to monetize through sponsorships and conferences](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

### Outreach Strategy and Capacity

  - [Initial focus on nurturing workshop attendees and growing community membership](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2386.0)
  - [Plan to use multiple team members' LinkedIn accounts for outreach (20-25 messages per day, per account)](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Email outreach to be handled through Instantly, with separate LinkedIn outreach via HeyReach](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

### Upcoming Events and Priorities

  - [Workshop on Thursday and Inbound happy hour the following week](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2346.0)
  - [Need to create follow-up campaigns for event attendees, focusing on community building and qualified lead nurturing](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2360.0)

### Sales Process Insights

  - [Tyler (AE) requested support with outbound messaging and list preparation](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=3022.0)
  - [Will provide 5-10 best sales call recordings/transcripts for context and objection handling insights](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=3137.0)

### HubSpot and Data Management

  - [GrowthX is in the process of setting up their HubSpot instance](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
  - [Understory to assist with HubSpot optimization and campaign setup](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2438.0)
  - [Need to establish clear criteria for lead scoring and prioritization post-events](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2748.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to share event calendar and target attendee lists](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2669.0)
  - [Tyler to provide 5-10 best sales call recordings/transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=3117.0)
  - [Understory to set up infrastructure for cold email (domains, inboxes, warming)](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2547.0)
  - [Understory to create project plan and prioritize initial campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2586.0)
  - [Schedule bi-weekly calls and set up Slack communication](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2679.0)
  - [Jason to provide HubSpot access to Understory team](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2934.0)
  - [Understory to begin building initial campaigns and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/fk4Hf2AvQTzGGgkJrL7zsWFRCkEztEwu?tab=summary&timestamp=2819.0)
